response: The production web server prod-web-01, hosted in the us-east-1 region, has maintained an uptime of 45 consecutive days, currently leveraging 78% of its CPU capacity, 12.4 of its 16 GB total memory, and 234 of its 500 GB total allocated disk space. It supports 127 active connections right now, with a P99 latency of 145ms and a very stable low error rate of only 3 errors per hour, reflecting consistent, reliable performance for its user workloads.
